violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Ice scoop on the front counter was stored in water.
Contaminated food disposition. — --Contaminated ready-to-eat food was not discarded as required. Container of peaches in the walk in cooler dated August 14th had mold on them, and not discarded.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Paper on on top of the dessert case were not inverted.
